channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Dark Star Orchestra @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-01 00:00 — Dark Star Orchestra at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. IVE is a rising K-pop group with a strong following and a unique sound, making their world tour a must-see event.

item.title: ENHYPEN @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-07-29 02:30 → 2026-07-30 02:30 — ENHYPEN at Oakland Arena. ENHYPEN's concerts are known for their high energy and impressive choreography, appealing to a dedicated fanbase.

item.title: IVE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-05 03:00 — IVE at Oakland Arena. Benson Boone is gaining traction in the indie pop scene, and his tour is a chance to catch him on the rise.

item.title: Tedeschi Trucks Band @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-13 01:00 — Tedeschi Trucks Band at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Tedeschi Trucks Band is known for their exceptional live performances, blending rock and blues with a strong following.

item.title: Santana @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-10 02:00 — Santana at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Santana and The Doobie Brothers offer a nostalgic yet vibrant concert experience, appealing to classic rock fans.

item.title: Corinne Bailey Rae @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-08-09 03:00 — Corinne Bailey Rae at The Fillmore. Corinne Bailey Rae's anniversary celebration promises a soulful evening with her beloved hits.

item.title: Interpol @ Warfield
item.description: 2026-08-12 03:00 — Interpol at Warfield. Interpol's return to the stage is highly anticipated, with their unique sound resonating with indie rock fans.

item.title: Little Feat @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-08-11 03:00 — Little Feat at Fox Theater - Oakland. Little Feat's farewell tour features legendary musicians and a chance to experience their classic hits live.

item.title: Sarah McLachlan @ Toyota Pavilion at Concord
item.description: 2026-08-02 02:00 — Sarah McLachlan at Toyota Pavilion at Concord. Sarah McLachlan's tour promises an emotional and captivating performance from a beloved artist.

item.title: WOODZ @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-07-28 02:30 — WOODZ at San Jose Civic. WOODZ's world tour is a significant event for K-pop fans, showcasing his rising star power.

item.title: Johnny Blue Skies @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-09-16 02:00 — Johnny Blue Skies at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Johnny Blue Skies offers a unique blend of genres, appealing to diverse music lovers.

item.title: Eagles of Death Metal @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-09-02 03:00 — Eagles of Death Metal at The Fillmore. Eagles of Death Metal's anniversary tour is a celebration of their energetic rock sound and loyal fanbase.

item.title: J. Cole @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-31 03:00 — J. Cole at Oakland Arena. J. Cole's tour is a major event in hip-hop, showcasing his lyrical prowess and strong stage presence.

item.title: Sweet Pill @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-08-29 03:00 — Sweet Pill at August Hall. Sweet Pill's tour is a chance to see an up-and-coming band making waves in the indie scene.

item.title: Muse @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-28 02:00 — Muse at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Muse's tour promises a spectacular live show with their signature theatricality and rock anthems.

item.title: Passion Pit @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-08-17 02:30 — Passion Pit at Fox Theater - Oakland. Passion Pit's tour brings back their catchy indie-pop sound, appealing to long-time fans.

item.title: Jose Gonzalez @ Uptown Theatre Napa
item.description: 2026-09-26 03:00 — Jose Gonzalez at Uptown Theatre Napa. Jose Gonzalez's intimate performance will resonate with fans of folk and acoustic music.
